description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image and runs a before_script to update apt, set the timezone to America/New_York, and install build-essential, python3, python3-dev, gsl-bin, libgsl-dev, python3-coverage, openmpi-bin, libopenmpi-dev, python3-pkgconfig, cython3, libhdf5-openmpi-103-1, libhdf5-openmpi-dev, hdf5-tools, git, python3-pip, python3-sphinx, python3-sphinxcontrib.programoutput, python3-nbsphinx, python3-msmb-theme, python3-venv, and twine. Define two stages (build and test) and cache the virtual‑environment directory ($VENV_DIR) and .cache/pip. In the build stage add a build job that runs "python3 --version", creates a virtual environment with "python3 -m venv $VENV_DIR", activates it, upgrades pip, installs coverage and the local package "../pNbody", then changes to the tests directory and executes "./coverage.sh" and "./test_make_docs.sh". Also in the build stage add a builddoc job that runs only on pushes, changes to the Doc directory, runs "make clean" and "make html", creates a public/Doc folder, moves the generated HTML files into it, and publishes the public directory as an artifact.
